limitations: All 41 public named exports are byte-bound, mapped, and production-built, but remain failed until the equal browser evidence suite produces SSR/pre-hydration/post-hydration, behavior, accessibility, screenshot/pixel, network, console, asset, and style evidence.
InputArea, GridItem, and Toasty are explicitly mapped through the machine-verifiable parent public exports ./components/input, ./components/grid, and ./components/toast.
